hooks.command: R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD")}"; H="$R/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] || H="$HOME/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] && bash "$H" --tool gemini --kind pretool-shell || true

R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD")}"; H="$R/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] || H="$HOME/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] && bash "$H" --tool gemini --kind pretool-read || true

R="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD")}"; H="$R/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] || H="$HOME/.graph-hooks/hook.sh"; [ -f "$H" ] && bash "$H" --tool gemini --kind sessionstart || true
